name: illuminate
description: Dense source in. Self-contained interactive HTML out. Three-stage arc: signal extraction (42-entry stratified signal block), Barbara Minto Pyramid construction with MECE adversarial audit, and a parallax interactive HTML artifact with evidence drawer, 3D cards, and ASCII art animation.
author: marcomorettim

examples.output: Single-file HTML: SCQA hero, GT typewriter, 4 MECE Key Lines, 42-signal evidence drawer, parallax ASCII art, confidence meters
Chapter-by-chapter synthesis with cross-chapter SYNTHESIS signals, counter-intuitive INSIGHT callouts, issue tree
Codebase provenance chain: L0→L4 translation layers as interactive evolution arc

capabilities.stage_1: Multi-source ingestion, 6-tag signal stratification (SOURCE/INSIGHT/METRIC/PRINCIPLE/SYNTHESIS/GAP), 3-angle extraction, provenance audit
capabilities.stage_2: Hub detection, MECE issue tree, Barbara Minto Pyramid, 3-skeptic adversarial audit
capabilities.stage_3: Parallax HTML artifact, animated ASCII art, 3D card physics, evidence drawer, progressive disclosure, keyboard navigation

evidence_contract.ASSERT: only claims that trace to a specific S-NNN signal block entry
evidence_contract.HEDGE: claims where evidence is partial, contested, or version-fragile
evidence_contract.EXCLUDE: claims where the trace cannot be established
